title: Kaleidoscope Chive Naan
description: A flavorful and colorful twist on traditional Indian naan, featuring the vibrant kaleidoscope ingredient.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, salt, sugar, and crushed kaleidoscope.
Add the ghee and mix until the dough comes together.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise for 1-2 hours.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 6-8 equal portions.
Roll out each portion into a ball and flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Place the naan on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the naan for 12-15 minutes or until they are golden brown.
Brush the naan with melted ghee and sprinkle with chopped chive.
Serve the kaleidoscope chive naan hot with your favorite Indian dishes.
